details: The agent successfully navigated to the correct Wikipedia page and retrieved complete, accurate data for the 3 most recent years. For 2024, it correctly listed John J. Hopfield and Geoffrey Hinton. For 2023, it correctly listed all three laureates: Pierre Agostini, Ferenc Krausz, and Anne L'Huillier. The agent also found 2025 data (John Clarke, Michel H. Devoret, John M. Martinis) which was the most recent year on the page at the time. All co-laureates were listed for each year.
